title: clematis recta subsp. nannophylla
intro: Clematis recta subsp. nannophylla, also known as the dwarf clematis, is a perennial plant belonging to the Clematis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of clematis recta subsp. nannophylla include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Traditional herbal preparations involve making teas or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
